allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "docker exec facehrm_app php artisan migrate --force 2>&1")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "docker exec facehrm_app php artisan storage:link 2>&1")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command @"
# Login as admin
$loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Body ''{""email"":""admin@example.com"",""password"":""12345678""}''
$token = $loginResp.data.token
Write-Host ''Token:'' $token.Substring\(0,20\) ''...''

# Get face enrollment list
$headers = @{ Authorization = ""Bearer $token"" }
$faceList = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/face'' -Method GET -Headers $headers
Write-Host ''Face list meta:'' \($faceList.meta | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)
Write-Host ''First employee enrolled:'' $faceList.data[0].is_enrolled
"@)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
$r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Body ''{""email"":""admin@example.com"",""password"":""12345678""}''
$t = $r.data.token
$h = @{Authorization=""Bearer $t""}
$f = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/face'' -Method GET -Headers $h
Write-Host ''enrolled:'' $f.meta.enrolled ''not_enrolled:'' $f.meta.not_enrolled
Write-Host ''First:'' $f.data[0].user.name ''is_enrolled:'' $f.data[0].is_enrolled
")
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Users\\KK\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Project\\FaceHRM\\web''; npm install face-api.js 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ''C:\\Users\\KK\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Project\\FaceHRM\\web\\public\\models'' | Out-Null; Write-Host ''Models dir created''")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
$base = ''https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights''
$dest = ''C:\\Users\\KK\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Project\\FaceHRM\\web\\public\\models''
$files = @\(
  ''tiny_face_detector_model-weights_manifest.json'',
  ''tiny_face_detector_model-shard1'',
  ''face_landmark_68_tiny_model-weights_manifest.json'',
  ''face_landmark_68_tiny_model-shard1'',
  ''face_recognition_model-weights_manifest.json'',
  ''face_recognition_model-shard1'',
  ''face_recognition_model-shard2''
\)
foreach \($f in $files\) {
  Write-Host ""Downloading $f...""
  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ""$base/$f"" -OutFile ""$dest\\$f"" -UseBasicParsing
}
Write-Host ''All models downloaded.''
")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
$dest = ''C:\\Users\\KK\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Project\\FaceHRM\\web\\public\\models''
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null
Test-Path $dest
")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "
$base = ''https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights''
$dest = ''C:\\Users\\KK\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Project\\FaceHRM\\web\\public\\models''
$files = @\(
  ''tiny_face_detector_model-weights_manifest.json'',
  ''tiny_face_detector_model-shard1'',
  ''face_landmark_68_tiny_model-weights_manifest.json'',
  ''face_landmark_68_tiny_model-shard1'',
  ''face_recognition_model-weights_manifest.json'',
  ''face_recognition_model-shard1'',
  ''face_recognition_model-shard2''
\)
foreach \($f in $files\) {
  Write-Host downloading $f
  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \($base + ''/'' + $f\) -OutFile \($dest + ''\\'' + $f\) -UseBasicParsing
}
Write-Host Done
")
Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location ''C:\\Users\\KK\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Project\\FaceHRM\\web''; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "
$r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Body \(''{""email"":""admin@example.com"",""password"":""12345678""}''\)
$t = $r.data.token
$h = @{Authorization=\(''Bearer '' + $t\)}
$ov = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/reports/overview'' -Headers $h
Write-Host ''total_employees:'' $ov.data.total_employees
Write-Host ''present_today:'' $ov.data.today.present
$att = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \(''http://localhost/api/v1/reports/attendance?year=2026&month=2''\) -Headers $h
Write-Host ''attendance rows:'' $att.data.Count ''working_days:'' $att.meta.working_days
$lv = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \(''http://localhost/api/v1/reports/leave?year=2026''\) -Headers $h
Write-Host ''leave rows:'' $lv.data.Count
$py = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \(''http://localhost/api/v1/reports/payroll?year=2026&month=2''\) -Headers $h
Write-Host ''payroll rows:'' $py.data.Count
")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "
$lr = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Body ''{""email"":""admin@example.com"",""password"":""12345678""}''
$tk = $lr.data.token
$hd = @{Authorization=''Bearer '' + $tk; ''Content-Type''=''application/json''}
$gs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/settings'' -Method GET -Headers $hd
Write-Host ''company name:'' $gs.data.company.''company.name''
Write-Host ''late threshold:'' $gs.data.attendance.''attendance.late_threshold''
Write-Host ''tax rate:'' $gs.data.payroll.''payroll.tax_rate''
")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "
$lr = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Body ''{""email"":""admin@example.com"",""password"":""12345678""}''
$tk = $lr.data.token
$hd = @{Authorization=''Bearer '' + $tk; ''Content-Type''=''application/json''}
$bd = ''{""company.name"":""PT FaceHRM Indonesia"",""attendance.late_threshold"":""08:30"",""payroll.tax_rate"":""6""}''
$up = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/settings'' -Method PUT -Headers $hd -Body $bd
Write-Host $up.message
$gs2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/settings'' -Method GET -Headers $hd
Write-Host ''after update - company:'' $gs2.data.company.''company.name'' ''threshold:'' $gs2.data.attendance.''attendance.late_threshold'' ''tax:'' $gs2.data.payroll.''payroll.tax_rate''
")

Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "
$lr = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/auth/login'' -Method POST -ContentType ''application/json'' -Body ''{""email"":""admin@example.com"",""password"":""12345678""}''
$tk = $lr.data.token
$hd = @{Authorization=''Bearer '' + $tk; ''Content-Type''=''application/json''}
$bd = ''{""company"":{""name"":""PT FaceHRM Indonesia""},""attendance"":{""late_threshold"":""08:30""},""payroll"":{""tax_rate"":""6""}}''
$up = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/settings'' -Method PUT -Headers $hd -Body $bd
Write-Host $up.message
$gs2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''http://localhost/api/v1/settings'' -Method GET -Headers $hd
Write-Host ''company:'' $gs2.data.company.''company.name''
Write-Host ''threshold:'' $gs2.data.attendance.''attendance.late_threshold''
Write-Host ''tax:'' $gs2.data.payroll.''payroll.tax_rate''
")
